name: The White House
subject: Meet the Cabinet: Administrator Linda McMahon
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=99b968c5b485c514163952f23fdf6b38b457ed9171ee9479a7469e89ed5d72ed2e737b7d942dc131b12b0b7fafcce507d8b03e7444fa5e86

Welcome to 1600 Daily's Meet the Cabinet series, where we showcase members of President Trump's Cabinet.

Meet Administrator Linda McMahon

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=99b968c5b485c5147b4a002a58d2cc770b95e51c4726778454bf9e4a04473b30941ca9ec417144c9b00991fceafb69d023754292aa31b28a

-------------

Administrator McMahon Launches Two-Year SBA Ignite Tour Across the Nation

The SBA Ignite Tour is a listening tour where Administrator McMahon will travel to the 68 SBA district offices and meet with local small business owners to hear their experiences and concerns. This provides an opportunity to not only spread the word about SBA, but provides the Administrator with real issues that she can bring back to Washington as she continues her main role as America’s small business advocate.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=99b968c5b485c5143193e4600e3b3e75d10f8023b1508c2ce37129610476e2df05286fa70d25f6c1a15a4faf2c88336de1a7c333210f5905
Read more

SBA Re-Imagined

Administrator McMahon has been finding that the general public tends to think of SBA as primarily loan-driven, rather than understanding the full breadth and scope of its full business assistance programs. The Administrator is planning to increase public awareness of the agency and its offerings with an updated brand and marketing plan to better reflect today’s entrepreneurs, due to be introduced by Small Business Week in April 2018.

Improved online resources for small business owners

Administrator McMahon is focused on creating an efficient and effective SBA that is responsive to the needs of today’s busy entrepreneurs. Two good examples of improved services are the expanded online
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8090db73ba667aaf9b410fa8968e22c12169f809c59d84e7826f7fb476779540ec7d6d1da1cbdacf884683a539224a2ecfb22a82f2ef691a
HUBZone map and
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8090db73ba667aaf5356a1c31b50c662d8b2cd26cd804373f18fbac1da08a99b803e077cd7f3b7486b6a4ef69dcf5dc5d27ef465618775eb
Lender Match. The new online HUBZone map helps small businesses in urban and rural communities determine if they are eligible for participation in HUBZone’s program. Lender Match is an online referral tool to connect small businesses in need of small business funding with participating SBA lenders. It was recently updated to create a more user-friendly experience.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8090db73ba667aafa11400692cca8e46debabf8860fbbfa73f0f57f79462b27846fc5004b49e71870821fc351f5cb89bbee78bb09bcc48a5
Read more

Photo of the Day

Administrator McMahon with Michigan County Commissioners at the White House | August 8 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

Coming Up This Month

Today, Administrator McMahon will meet with President Trump in Bedminster, NJ. Later this month, the Administrator will travel to Idaho and Colorado as part of the Small Business Administration's National Ignite Tour.

Follow Administrator McMahon on

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8090db73ba667aafa79912983c3f8e02509ecdf9afaba92b282e932349a1914ddf86aa1f43ce9a6e7591d4a82f231ae361830cc9335bb14b
Twitter and
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8090db73ba667aaf6623633bd655f31510116f8ea9b813cbde38a8b6eab7bb77ba2b4c2a60b769aaf1d2b7568df7dc1e7ce13d13fbc4b5f9
Facebook

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8090db73ba667aaf3b79ca371afcad9ab6f0ba82f4f2fd67c1701db9bf41f6674b495d6858def97009f8232fe1b9a8ed4c14d485e36e02ac
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8090db73ba667aaf38ae41ce6b3f648ffc5d45dd8f3df888b0d61f782e9233af9518861ac94327fe81a0ccd37df338519d47080c239baca4

name: Debbie
subject: Trump is targeting our seniors
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friend, Eighty-two years ago, former President Franklin Delano Roosevelt made a promise to our seniors when he signed Social Security into law -- if you work hard and pay into Social Security, Social Security will be there for you. Millions of seniors were lifted out of poverty. Democrats have made good on the promise that our seniors deserve the chance to retire with dignity. **Now, President Trump and Republicans are trying to break that promise.** Trump has called for more than $64 billion in budget cuts to Social Security Disability Insurance. SSDI provides for workers who have become disabled before their 65th birthday as well as for their families in the event of their passing. [_**Don 't allow Republicans to jeopardize the financial security and well-being of seniors and the disabled. Add your name.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e2b/622b7b5b/5216698/307bdc47/104512483/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170814") I am proud to represent the more than 100,000 individuals who are enrolled in Social Security in my district. **Social Security beneficiaries in Florida contribute more than $123 billion to our state economy.** They are creating jobs and contributing to our communities. [_**I have every intention of keeping the promise of Social Security. Sign your name and stand with me.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e2b/622b7b5b/5216698/307bdc47/104512483/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170814") Thank you, Debbie |

name: Tom Perez
subject: Rise and organize this Weekend of Action
body:
There has never been a more important moment to organize
---
Derek --

All summer long, Democrats have been organizing in every zip code to resist the GOP's harmful agenda.

But at this moment in our history, the work that we do to mobilize our communities in support of our shared American values has never mattered more.

This weekend, we're holding a nationwide Weekend of Action to rise against hatred and organize to defeat all those who would perpetuate it. **[There's an event near you -- can you join in?](http://my.democrats.org/page/event/detail/4vgx3)**

Here are the details:

**Virginia AAPI Weekend of Action**
**When:** Saturday, August 19th at 12:00 pm EDT
**Where:** Kathy Tran for Delegate Campaign Office
6116 Rolling Road, Unit 301A
Springfield, VA 22152

**[RSVP](http://my.democrats.org/page/event/detail/4vgx3)**
Everything you've done so far this summer -- knocking on doors and making calls, registering voters, helping elect Democrats in your community -- has made an incredible, meaningful difference to right the wrongs that have been set in motion since January 20th.

What happened this past weekend in Charlottesville, and Donald Trump's disgraceful actions since, should only motivate us to keep fighting even harder for what is right.

**Come out this Weekend of Action to an event near you, and say you'll rise and organize with us:**

**[RSVP](http://my.democrats.org/page/event/detail/4vgx3)**
See you out there,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. -- Can't make an event this weekend? **[Chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us keep organizing.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052376e/4067b0a/3cb974323/7e6f216c/3849267035/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats-20171?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+10+or+whatever+you+can+to+help+u&utm_campaign=em_20170817_tp_dis&source=em_20170817_tp_dis")**

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052376e/4067b0a/3cb974323/7e6f216d/3849267035/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170817_tp_dis&source=em_20170817_tp_dis"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052376e/4067b0a/3cb974323/7e6f216a/3849267035/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170817_tp_dis&source=em_20170817_tp_dis"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052376e/4067b0a/3cb974323/7e6f216b/3849267035/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170817_tp_dis&source=em_20170817_tp_dis") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052376e/4067b0a/3cb974323/7e6f2168/3849267035/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170817_tp_dis&source=em_20170817_tp_dis"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Remove this symbol of hatred
body:
#
Team --
Governor Rick Scott had lunch with President Trump today. His office explained the lunch was scheduled last week, and they had important issues to discuss.
Unfortunately, it doesn't appear that removing the Confederate monument on the grounds of our Old State Capitol here in Tallahassee was one of them, and for that I am disappointed.
Yesterday I asked the Governor to remove it because I firmly believe that removing this symbol of hate is an issue important to Florida -- and should be at the forefront.
In all sincerity, I hope the Governor acts to remove this symbol of hatred. It commemorates one of the ugliest moments in our nation's history and has no place on public land. That's why I'm asking you to join together with me to tell Governor Scott just how important it is that we take down this Confederate monument immediately.
[**Add your name to our petition to remove this hateful symbol from Florida 's Old State Capitol >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32af/9e00690/4c90bdca/24036f88/1137581705/VEsH/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/standagainsthate?source=email")
If he still refuses, I will remove this monument on my first day as Governor.
In the vision I have for Florida, there is no place for hatred and discrimination. We may not be able to change our history in Florida, but we can change our future here.
When I am Governor, we will work together to learn from Florida's past instead of glorifying our state's ugliest moments. We won't pretend that justice and equality have been fully achieved. Instead, we'll acknowledge areas we need to improve in and strive to do better every day. We're going to have the tough conversations necessary to make progress, even if it makes us uncomfortable. As my mother always says, our values matter not when it's easy, but when it's hard.
We can make Florida a state where we celebrate diversity instead of division, where we learn from our past instead of trying to live in it. It's going to be hard, but if you're willing to work together with me now, I promise you that we can rebuild Florida into a state that works for all of us.

This is the beginning of something better for all of us. Thank you for being a part of it.
Bring it home,
Andrew

name: Tom Perez
subject: Derek, sign your name next to mine:
body:
Republicans must renounce all enablers of white supremacy
---
**It's not enough to reject hatred -- Republicans must denounce Donald Trump for enabling white supremacists. Co-sign Tom's letter to the Chairwoman of the GOP:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Co-Sign1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170817_tp2_nd&source=em_20170817_tp2_nd")**

Derek --

When white supremacists and Nazis march in our streets, wearing swastikas and chanting racist slogans, threatening to burn synagogues and committing violent acts of terrorism, simply denouncing them does not go far enough. We must also hold accountable all those who embrace these elements of our society or embolden their cause.

Donald Trump has allowed white supremacists, neo-Nazis, and the Ku Klux Klan to find a home in the Republican Party. First through his silence in the immediate aftermath of Charlottesville and then with his words since, he has given them cause to feel empowered.

So it is not enough for the Republican Party to reject their hateful ideology -- they must also renounce Donald Trump.

Yesterday, I sent a letter to the Chairwoman of the Republican Party to remind her that her party has to not only reject the white supremacists but also the enabler they have found in Donald Trump.

**You can read the letter below, and then sign your name next to mine -- call on the Republican Party to join us on the right side of history and disavow Donald Trump:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Co-Sign1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170817_tp2_nd&source=em_20170817_tp2_nd")**
As Democrats, we will keep fighting against racism and oppression in all its forms, and we will never stop working to lift up our Democratic values that make this country great.

Thank you,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

* * *

_Dear Chairwoman McDaniel,

When we met in July, you said: "We have to have reasonable discussions, have a dialogue, be respectful of each other."

In recent days, some of the least reasonable, least respectful members of our society have risen to prominence with a message of pure hatred. They chanted racist and anti-Semitic slurs. They wore swastikas, made the Nazi salute, and celebrated symbols of slavery and mass genocide. They instilled fear in our communities and they murdered a woman in a clear act of domestic terrorism.
The leader of your Republican Party, President Trump, responded first with silence, then with begrudging condemnation, and most recently with words that embolden white supremacy. He tore open the scars of history while creating a dangerous false equivalency between those upholding racism and those fighting to defeat it.

Madam Chairwoman, the white hoods are gone. They march in torchlight now, unafraid to show their faces. They see the president as their leader and fiercest defender.

There is no denying that these white supremacists, neo-Nazis, and the Ku Klux Klan have made their home in this president's Republican Party. As chairwoman, you bear a responsibility not just to reject hateful ideology generally, but to hold accountable the individuals in your party who have allowed that ideology to flourish.

You bear a responsibility to stop Donald Trump.

There are not "many sides" to the issue of white supremacy. There is right and wrong. Those who gathered in Charlottesville in the name of racism were wrong, and it is up to all of us to stand up for what is right.

Will history remember your party as one that surrendered to a man who empowered neo-Nazis? Will history remember you as the chair who allowed white supremacy to spread with your party's blessing?

Many of America's greatest heroes made the ultimate sacrifice fighting against the same evil ideology on the rise today. Party affiliation had nothing to do with it. If you share their patriotism, you should disavow President Trump now.

Last weekend, the American people -- Democrats and Republicans alike -- saw the streets of Charlottesville flood with evil. They heard the bloodthirsty chants of bigotry. And they are demanding action. It's time for both of our parties to unite against these white supremacists and all of their enablers -- including the president of the United States. Will you join us on the right side of history?

Tom _

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: Our biggest GOP opposition program EVER
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6618/24c69fd9/b1a85378/18981ee4/2165393684/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE826N_digital_email_20170817_OnNoticeText_inact&source=WQEFE826N_digital_email_20170817_OnNoticeText_inact")

Peter,

We've put a record **_50 Republicans_** "On Notice" for their horrible anti-choice records, and that means we're planning to flip their seats in 2018.

This is our most robust Republican opposition program **ever.**

Voters know they deserve better than these guys. They deserve EMILY's List women.

And we already have several EMILY's List women running against these Republicans with more to come.

**[Donate $3 to make sure we have the resources to recruit and train strong candidates to run against these 50 Republicans next year.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6618/24c69fd9/b1a85378/18981ee5/2165393684/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170811_email_OnNoticeText?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+make+sure+we+have+the+resour&utm_campaign=WQEFE826N_digital_email_20170817_OnNoticeText_inact&source=WQEFE826N_digital_email_20170817_OnNoticeText_inact")**

We've already endorsed women running against these three On Notice Republicans:
**Rep. Rodney Frelinghuysen (NJ-11)** once sent a fundraising letter to a bank calling out an employee who worked there for being one of his vocal opponents. She later resigned after being required to write a statement to the CEO. It's unacceptable for an elected official to intimidate their constituents like this.

Our EMILY's List candidate running against him: **Mikie Sherrill **

**Rep. Ed Royce (CA-39)** once attended an anti-Muslim protest outside a fundraiser for disaster relief and women's shelters. He told the crowd that multiculturalism was paralyzing America.

Our EMILY's List candidate running against him: **Mai Khanh Tran **

And Trumpcare's **Deciding Vote Dean Heller (NV-Senate)** is one of our best opportunities to flip a Senate seat blue next year. After protesting about the heavy human cost of Trumpcare, Heller folded and was the deciding vote to advance the legislation.

Our EMILY's List candidate running against him: **Jacky Rosen **
If we have these three women's backs, they all can flip critical seats.

**[Donate $3 to help Mikie, Mai Khanh, Jacky, and the dozens of women we're recruiting to unseat On Notice Republicans.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6618/24c69fd9/b1a85378/18981ee6/2165393684/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170811_email_OnNoticeText?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+Donate+3+to+help+Mikie+Mai+Khanh+Jacky+a&utm_campaign=WQEFE826N_digital_email_20170817_OnNoticeText_inact&source=WQEFE826N_digital_email_20170817_OnNoticeText_inact")**

Thank you,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List
P.S. These 50 Republicans are just the start. We'll be putting more vulnerable Republicans On Notice over the next couple of months. **[Donate $3 to help recruit and support pro-choice Democratic women to run against them.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6618/24c69fd9/b1a85378/18981ee0/2165393684/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170811_email_OnNoticeText?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+Donate+3+to+help+recruit+and+support+pro&utm_campaign=WQEFE826N_digital_email_20170817_OnNoticeText_inact&source=WQEFE826N_digital_email_20170817_OnNoticeText_inact")**
